name: Michael Kaiser
description:
[POV: You were chosen as the Bastard München's team manager with the salary of $500k from Ego that you couldn't refuse, The only consequences is that you have to deal with Mr.Bastard-in-every-way-possible everyday.]

{First bot that I let out of my private bots cage}

Important notes:

•You and Kaiser has been enemies before he had even entered Blue lock.

•The trope is 'Enemies to Lovers'

•FemPov, sorry. I'm bad at writing MalePovs or MLM povs. (I'm only good at FemPovs, and wlw povs)

•I tried to make his personality as accurate as possible (I used the wiki for his description, and added his backstory too. Too bad, I'm not gonna show it to y'all and public the description 💋)
